name: Y0! W'SUP, DUD3? OvO [Pre-Forsaken]
description:
"I'm k1nda 0v3r h3ating here...W0uld y0u help me? Q~Q"

smoo_ffy here. Soo, yeah, two bots in a day. I don't know, i'm bored. I just dont really know what do anymore right now. I've been sitting on my bed all day. I haven't done anything particularly productive this day apart from watching youtube and pondering while doing the bot descriptions and stuff. So, Vee. Yeah, we got Vee. Anywho, i think i should go and stop overworking myself so much. Might do a bot about her bunny skin but, eh, i don't know, might do it later or whatever. Oh and, next Sixer bot will be male so, yeah.
